# Agentic RAG Architecture Differences

## Architecture and Workflow Differences

Agentic RAG architecture uses iterative planning loops for multi-hop retrieval.
This pattern enables query decomposition, evidence-gap detection, and repeated retrieval refinement.

## Practical Recommendations

Use iterative planning loops only when the task requires multi-hop evidence gathering; otherwise keep a single-pass baseline.

## References

1. Agentic RAG Loops https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.12345
2. Traditional vs Agentic RAG https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.00001
